We are currently casting for a strong female performer to play Jill in our adults only pantomime Jack OFF The Beanstalk opening at Scala London. We are looking for a good actress with an excellent singing voice and mover.
The rehearsals dates are the 9th to 13th November and 7th to 11th December. The playing dates are 14th December to 3rd January 2027.We are offering a good fee for all rehearsals and playing dates. Please email details including a singing reel to info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

items.text:
**🎥  CASTING CALL OUT 🎥**

We are casting for a short film based on a research project exploring the experiences and emotions of ethnic minority police officers within the police force.

The film is voiceover-led, with the characters’ inner thoughts and feelings heard through narration. We are looking for performers who can convey emotion on screen through natural, grounded and compelling performances.

We are currently casting:

**AISHA**
Asian woman, playing a Constable

**SAMIR**
Asian man, playing a frontline officer

**RODGER**
Afro-Caribbean man, playing a Detective

We are also looking for extras of all ethnicities, so there will be a range of opportunities to get involved.

**Filming:** Week commencing 10th August
**Location:** In and around Leicestershire
**Roles:** Paid

To apply, please email your name, headshot and showreel to: olivia@candegroup.co.uk

🎬 DWAYNE JOHNSON MOVIE CASTING! Be in 'Lizard Music' filming in Georgia! ✨👇

Ready to share the screen with a Hollywood legend? 🌟 An unbelievable new opportunity just hit the casting board, and production needs YOU to bring the energy to a massive sports scene! 🤯🎥

Rose Locke Casting is officially looking for Background Actors to portray family members at a Little League baseball game in the upcoming feature film 'Lizard Music,' starring Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson! Filming right in Brooks, Georgia, this is your ultimate chance to get on a major movie set, cheer from the bleachers, and secure a solid paycheck. Grab your sunscreen, bring your best stadium energy, and claim your spot in the stands! 🎫🔥

The Breakdown:
🎬 Project: Feature Film 'Lizard Music'
💰 Rate: $196/12 hrs
📍 Location: Brooks, Georgia 🍑
🎭 Seeking: all ethnicities

How to Apply:
Do not let this incredible on-set experience pass you by! ⏰ Tag your Georgia acting squad, share this to your story, and apply RIGHT NOW at: 👉 projectcasting.com/jobs 🔗

#GeorgiaCasting #LizardMusic #ProjectCasting #OpenCall #RoseLockeCasting #GeorgiaFilm #ActorsLife #Auditions #WorkingActor #SetLife #NowCasting #BackgroundActor #DwayneJohnson

We are now casting  for our touring   Autumn show Viva Las Vegas .

The show is a musical  show featuring songs  of Sinatra, Judy Garland , Fred Astaire And Ginger Rogers  as well; as songs from Top Hat,  Easter Parade, The Wizard Of Oz  and more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 24th -28th August  

Playing Dates- 31st  August  -30th October

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are offering 700.00 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel  to info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

Hello everyone! We hope you’re all doing well and enjoying the sunshine.

Would you like to be part of This Girl? We’re currently looking for someone to play the iconic role of Stuart Sutcliffe in our production.

If you, or someone you know, would be interested in taking on this exciting role, we’d love to hear from you.

For more information, please email: howl.michael1963@yahoo.co.uk

Please feel free to share this post with anyone who may be suitable.

Thank you! 🎭✨

items.text:
Showreel Sunday!

It’s that time again,  your chance to get your face seen! 

Drop your showreel link in the comments below, whether you’re an actor, voice-over artist, presenter, or creative, this is your space to shine. ✨

You never know who might be scrolling through… casting directors, agents, indie producers, someone out there could be looking for you.

✅ Remember to include your name, playing age, and Spotlight or agent details (if you’ve got them).

We want to encourage all our members to share their work, the more places you share your showreel, the more chances you’ve got of being seen. So don’t hold back,  post it proudly!  

So go on, don’t be shy. Share your showreel, show your talent, and take the spotlight.

It’s your stage, own it. 💪🎬🇬🇧

items.text:
Do kolejnego lipcowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do ról:

1. Roman (44) – pedof*l, zwabia dzieci do vana. Niepozorny, przeciętny wygląd, nie ma nic szczególnego. Spokojny, cierpliwy, metodyczny w działaniu. Nie jest agresywny, ale jest dziwny i creepy.  AKTOR  - KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Daty: 21 i 22.07
Stawki: 1400 zł netto za całość

2. Marek (60) – Krzepki starszy mężczyzna, zadbany, Na pierwszy rzut oka życzliwy, spokojny senior, aktywny w lokalnej społeczności. W rzeczywistości zwolennik twardych metod wychowawczych, zamknął wnuczkę w piwnicy, żeby ją „naprostować”. 
Data: 21 i 22.07
Stawki: 1400 zł netto za całość

3. Pijaczek  (42) – miejscowy alkoholik, stały bywalec sklepu. Zaniedbany, w brudnych ubraniach. Prostolinijny, bezpośredni.
Data: 21.07
Stawki: 400 zł netto

4. Sklepikarz (36) – właściciel sklepu monopolowego. Arogancki, impulsywny, wulgarny.
Data: 22.07
Stawka: 400 zł netto

5. Paweł (38) – ojciec 10-latki. Postawny, udaje, że ma pieniądze, a jest spłukany. Wybuchowy, arogancki, przekonany o swojej wyższości.  
Data: 21.07
Stawka: 600 zł netto

6. Dorian (34) – kafar, duży, można się go bać, lubi dbać o wygląd. Szybki, umie biegać. Poszukiwany listem gończym za rozboje i włamania. 
Data: 21 i 22.07
Stawki: 1200 zł netto

7. Tata Olafa (40) – przystojny, pomocny.
Data: 21.07
Stawki: 400 zł netto

8. Dres 1 (20) – zwinny, w dresie, wulgarny. 
Data: 22.07
Stawki: 400 zł netto

9. Dres 2 (22) – grubszy, w dresie, pewny siebie 
Data: 22.07
Stawki: 400 zł netto

10. Ludwik (60) – stateczny, spokojny, nieco zlękniony mężczyzna
Data: 21.07
Stawki: 400 zł netto

Chętny Panów zapraszam do wysyłania PILNYCH zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:
1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku
8. Informację kiedy ostatnio grali Państwo w serialu „Gliniarze” 

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
Vorverkauf gestartet: 
  TRAIN45: Summer Jump 2026

  Gentlemens Rockabilly  mit 
Sievert Ahrend, Reinhard de Witt und Ernst Wiemer 

Ob von Deutsch zu Englisch, ob von Country zu Rockn`Roll, ob von Banjo zu Gitarre; hier ist nix gehupft wie gesprungen, sondern es geht ab mit z.T. neuen Songs, veränderten Arrangements und einem Ernst Wiemer am Saxophon on Top!
Zu hören und zu sehen am:
Freitag, d. 04. September 2026, 20 Uhr
Samstag, d. 05. September 2026, 20 Uhr
Kulturspeicher Leer

Karten 🎫 für beide Konzerte gibt es bei:
Haushaltswaren Hibben ☎️ 0491-928690, 
Sievert Ahrend ☎️ 0491-3077,
 📱 0172-4579778,
Email: sievert.ahrend@gmx.de 
und (wenn noch vorhanden) an der Abendkasse.

🎭 **CASTING CALL — FLOOR ACTS WANTED!**

Taconhy Entertainment is looking for talented **floor acts** to join our brand-new touring show.

We are seeking professional performers currently based in the United States who are ready to be part of an exciting new production.

For tour dates, payment details, accommodations, and all additional information, please contact us directly.

📧 **[taconhyshows@gmail.com](mailto:taconhyshows@gmail.com)**
📱 **702-637-5599**

**Email or text preferred.**

Please include your act information, photos and videos when contacting us. Thank you!

sharedPost.text:
MEET THE CAST - 
MAKEUP AND KISS SHORT FILM
 🎭🎬🎥🏳️‍🌈💄💋

ACTRESS: Boo Palmer 

ROLE: Party Goer (Bit Part) 

Boo Palmer is an Essex based actress who is currently studying drama at Anglia Ruskin University (@aru_drama @angliaruskin). She has been performing onstage since a very young age. 

Boo started acting in local amateur dramatic groups in churches alongside her family. However, it wasn’t until she got the eponymous  character in her year six production ‘Cinderella, Rockerfella’ is when she realised that she wanted to go into the entertainment industry. 

Boo then joined her local TheatreTrain group where she was trained in acting, singing and dancing. Using these skills, she has  acted in London stage performances, including at the Royal Albert Hall (@royalalberthall) 

Alongside this, Boo performed in a couple of her  secondary school productions, including Mary Poppins Junior, where she portrayed Bert.

More recently, she joined Maldon Pantomime Society (@maldonpanto) where she played multiple roles, including the villain and the principal boy.
Since being at university Boo performed in Gazelle Theatre’s (@gazelletheatre) pantomime ‘Cinderella’.

Acting in ‘Makeup and Kiss’ has been Boo’s first experience of screen work.

“Stepping into the world of screen acting surrounded by friends has been a truly wonderful experience. I couldn’t have asked for a greater cast or director to share this experience with.” - Boo Palmer 

#drama #stageplay #theatre #actress #performingarts #film

CASTING CALL FOR A THRILLER/HORROR SHORT FILM! NO ACTING EXPERIENCE NEEDED!
Checkout @grimaldyproductions on all social medias including YouTube for previous award-winning works.

We are shooting July 19-20th. Lunch will be provided!

Please contact me for any questions, comments or concerns or if you are interested in being a crew member.

Note 1: Some characters like the missing teens will only need to be on set one day for one or two hours.

Note 2: You do not have to be the age listed on this poster, you can audition for an older or younger character.

Note 3: The News Anchor role can be acted on the actor's schedule, not necessarily the exact shooting dates

items.text:
**Are you ready to take your acting career to the next level?**

Scene 2 Screen Acting based in South Manchester and ran by Actor Andrew Ellis (This is England, The Walk-In, This is Going to Hurt) are celebrating our first birthday!

Over the past 12 months we have had 200+ actors through our doors, working together, learning new skills and sharpening existing skillsets. 

Best of all Andrew has a huge emphasis on practical learning and filming, meaning you come away each block with 2 showreel style scenes that are yours to keep! 

Our classes are based in the amazing Creative Space above Wythenshawe library, with a huge free carpark and great public transport links (we might be the only acting class you can fly too, should you want that is) also… We have air conditioning… which sounds nice right about now. 

Classes cost just £85 for a block of 4 two hour sessions. 

Drop us an email on: [Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com](mailto:Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com) 

To enquire. 

Time to take your acting to the next level!

**Are you ready to take your acting career to the next level?**

Scene 2 Screen Acting based in South Manchester and ran by Actor Andrew Ellis (This is England, The Walk-In, This is Going to Hurt) are celebrating our first birthday!

Over the past 12 months we have had 200+ actors through our doors, working together, learning new skills and sharpening existing skillsets. 

Best of all Andrew has a huge emphasis on practical learning and filming, meaning you come away each block with 2 showreel style scenes that are yours to keep! 

Our classes are based in the amazing Creative Space above Wythenshawe library, with a huge free carpark and great public transport links (we might be the only acting class you can fly too, should you want that is) also… We have air conditioning… which sounds nice right about now. 

Classes cost just £85 for a block of 4 two hour sessions. 

Drop us an email on: [Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com](mailto:Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com) 

To enquire. 

Time to take your acting to the next level!
items.title: **Are you ready to take your acting career to the next level?**

All Ethnicities Welcome! 

Filming in Greater Boston area!!

Must know how to Act On-Camera and Take Direction On Set.

Must be Camera Ready with Hair, Make Up, Wardrobe.

- your name
- phone number 
- are you SAG or NONSAG?
- age range

- attach a few RECENT, clear photos of yourself 
#gwciseeking #EXTRAS #youngpeople #clublife

items.text:
📣 ACTOR CALLOUT 🥂

Looking for our perfect Roger and David to star in the debut of *Speech, Speech* at SE Fest in London! 

Please follow the link below to submit your lovely self-tapes, as well as to find the audition pack:

[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSftnWlqHZgPS7beG99WkiC7ZO0jwYdhtsjMGCSUpdBCt7-qhQ/viewform?usp=header](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSftnWlqHZgPS7beG99WkiC7ZO0jwYdhtsjMGCSUpdBCt7-qhQ/viewform?usp=header)

If you have any additional access requirements, or any further questions then please message me directly, or email [tristan.simpson99@gmail.com](mailto:tristan.simpson99@gmail.com) 📧

Share far and wide with anyone you feel would be a good fit! 

We can’t wait to see them, go crazy with it  👀 🤪

He tries to play cool, he can be nonchalant, he ταη be mysterious, but reality clear that he deeply about things, and wears his heart sleeve. cares DAVID After finding out his husband's been having αη affair, David has just returned the UK and, understandably, isn't feeling too great about himself. Normally he's witty, intelligent, the life and soul, however his current state it's safe to say little bit more cynical about things.'

items.text:
📣 **Parents, considering home education from September? **
***Feeling nervous? Not sure where to start?***

Hi 👋🏼
We are Josh & Aimee, owners of Swan Tutoring! An online, flexible education platform for home educating families 🏡

In August** we are holding an **✨** Open Week **✨ designed for those who are considering home education and are new to it, and those who have been home educating for a while!** You can try our engaging online classes for just £3 (+VAT) per lesson per screen!**

☕️💬 There are also some FREE online **social events** included, giving you chance to meet other home educating families**.**

And receive a FREE **welcome pack** delivered to your door! 📦🏡

Let me know if you'd like more information! 😊
Best regards,
Aimee
Swan Tutoring

items.title: Let's welcome our new members!

items.text:
CASTING CALL
Paid

Location Boston 

Travel and lodging available 

Imdb credit 

Available on YouTube TV

CASTING NOTICE

Independent Crime/Action Drama Series

Project Title: Doppelgangers

Genre: Crime Thriller • Action • Mystery • Romance

Logline:

Everyone has a doppelganger. What if yours was a serial killer who framed you for murder?

We are seeking talented actors for an upcoming independent dramatic series set in Boston. The project combines suspense, action, romance, and psychological drama.

LEAD ROLES

REMI (Lead)

Female | Early to Mid-20s

A kind, intelligent, and compassionate young woman whose life is turned upside down when she is accused of a string of murders committed by her identical doppelganger. Must portray vulnerability, determination, and emotional depth.

LEIGH (Lead)

Female | Early to Mid-20s

Remi's doppelganger. A charismatic, fearless assassin with a dangerous edge. Leigh is manipulative, witty, and confident but unexpectedly develops genuine feelings for Josh, forcing her to question everything she knows. This role requires an actress capable of portraying both charm and menace.

Note: One actress may be cast to portray both Remi and Leigh, or the roles may be cast separately depending on auditions.

JOSH (Lead)

Male | Mid-20s to Early 30s

Remi's lifelong best friend who has secretly loved her for years. Honest, loyal, and courageous, Josh becomes entangled in Leigh's deception, believing she is Remi. Looking for someone with strong emotional range and natural chemistry.

SUPPORTING ROLES

TRISTEN

Male | Late-20s to Mid-30s

Remi's sophisticated older brother. Intelligent, observant, and composed. The only person capable of telling the two women apart.

DETECTIVE LYNCH

Male | 30s–50s

Experienced homicide detective investigating the Mystic River murders. Tough, analytical, and persistent.

DETECTIVE CRAWLY

Female | 30s–50s

A determined detective assigned to the case. Sharp instincts, confident, and unafraid to challenge assumptions.

HANK

Male | 40s–60s

Leader of a dangerous assassin organization. Intelligent, intimidating, and manipulative. Primary antagonist.

ROOK (Daniel Pianso)

Male | 20s–40s

One of Hank's trusted operatives. Ruthless and efficient.

RICHARD

Male | 20s–40s

Another member of Hank's crew. Loyal, intimidating, and dangerous.

DAYPLAYER

HERB

Male | Any Adult Age

A witness whose testimony becomes critical to the investigation. 

PRODUCTION INFORMATION

Genre: Crime Thriller / Action / Mystery

Setting: Boston, Massachusetts

Filming Location: Boston area (subject to change)

Compensation: TBD

Union Status: Non-Union and union.

HOW TO SUBMIT

Please submit to vintageproductions2026@gmail.com 

Headshot

Resume

Demo reel (if available)

Contact information

Role(s) of interest

Selected actors will be contacted with audition details.

We encourage performers of all backgrounds and experience levels to submit.

Thank you for your interest in Doppelgangers. We look forward to seeing your audition!

Having so much fun on Mondays! This might look a bit tricky if you've never danced before but I promise you this is a BEGINNERS class! Completely welcoming, completely aimed at "Come and have a go!!" We dance because we enjoy it, because it's good for us. Not for perfection. 👌 And you'll get a great workout in the process. Come and find your new favourite thing to do! These guys are 3 sessions in and haven't looked back.

#danceliverpool #adultclass #trysomethingnew #britneyspears #MoveMore

items.title: 🎭 **Still Casting!**

items.text:
Hi everyone! 😊
Bit of an unusual one…

I own a couple of really unique content/photo studios in South London, and I’m looking to meet creative people who enjoy making content—whether that’s for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, modelling, UGC, photography, music videos or just for fun.

Www.smshyowlstudios.com

I’d love to build a friendly community of like-minded creators who fancy getting together every now and then to shoot, collaborate, bounce ideas around and help each other grow. No pressure, no competition—just good people creating great content together.

The spaces include two studios less than half a mile apart. One is a luxury penthouse with a rooftop hot tub and panoramic London views, while the other is a huge industrial studio packed with unique sets including a black baby grand piano, golden throne, drive-in capability, neon speaker wall, aerial hoop, dance pole and loads more.

I’m 38 and based around Oval/Camberwell, and I’m always happy to meet creative, friendly people. Whether you’re an experienced creator or you’re just looking to build your confidence and create more content, you’d be very welcome.

If it sounds like something you’d enjoy, send me a message! I’d love to build a supportive local network of content creators where people can collaborate, make friends and create some amazing work together. ✨

Accidentally sent before I was ready- 

CASTING CALL – “BRAVERY” 

Genre: Drama
Location: BC Lower Mainland & Fraser Valley
Shoot Dates: Late July to Early August
Compensation:, UBCP Low Budget, IMDB credit, potential for proof of concept to become feature.

This is a casting call for a proof of concept film titled BRAVERY, based on the book by the same name. BRAVERY is an inspirational true story about a family’s fight to keep their son alive after he is born with a life-threatening heart condition.

We are currently casting for the following roles:

• GWEN (Younger) – Female, Caucasian, 30s

• GWEN (Older) – Female, Caucasian, 60s–70s

• BARB – Female, Caucasian, mid teens

• KIM (Young) – Female, Caucasian, Early to Mid Teens
(Bonus if you have horse riding experience)

• KIM (Older) – Female, Caucasian, Late 20s to Early 30s

• CAM – Male, Caucasian, Late 20s to Early 30s

• POLICE OFFICER – Adult, Male

• PARAMEDIC – Adult, Male

SUBMISSIONS:

Please send your headshot and name along with any relevant acting experience to:
filmbravery@gmail.com

We look forward to hearing from you!

items.text:
***PAID* Casting Call for Les Immigrants - The Party**

"Girls, Insecure, Sex and the City, but more raw, more real"

Short-film Logline: A romantic dramedy exploring modern dating, identity and self-worth, seen from the eyes of an immigrant woman navigating a chaotic night that shifts from illusion to reality.

**CASTING ACTORS FOR SIX ROLES**

**1) Jean-Paul**. Age range: 35-40, male, open ethnicity, French or Italian accent prioritized

Jean-Paul is charming, intelligent, emotionally unavailable, and deeply insecure beneath the surface. He craves connection but fears vulnerability. His actions often contradict his feelings, creating tension between what he wants and what he allows himself to have.

Note: Actor must be comfortable performing intimacy on camera, kissing scenes.

**2) Juan**. Age range: 30's, male, Latin/Mexican ethnicity, with a Spanish accent

Juan is charismatic, confident, impulsive, and impossible to ignore.

He moves through the world with ease, charm, and a reckless sense of freedom, but beneath his playful exterior is a man who avoids vulnerability.

Note: Actor must be comfortable performing intimacy on camera, kissing scenes.

**3) Kaddie**. Age range: 25-35, female, open ethnicity

Kaddie is beautiful, confident, magnetic, and emotionally dangerous. She walks into a room and immediately becomes the center of attention, but beneath her charm is a deeply competitive streak and a need for validation. She is always keeps people guessing.

Note: Actor must be comfortable performing intimacy on camera, kissing scenes.

**4) Receptionist-Cashier: **age range: 40-50, open gender, open ethnicity

The Receptionist has personality, warmth and a strong sense of self. This person brings a brief moment of levity/comedy and human connection in our protagonists journey.

**5) Patron: **age range: 40 to 65, male, open ethnicity, can be out of shape/all body shapes

A regular at the underground party with strong presence and personality. He helps create the unique atmosphere of the underground party and adds texture, humor, and realism to the environment.

**6) Bartender: **age range: 25-40, open gender, open ethnicity, non-speaking on camera, must be tall

The bartender is effortlessly attractive, charismatic, and confident.

ALSO CASTING THE FOLLOWING FEATURED BG/SOC 

7) A couple is kissing under a lamp in the distance in Gastown, open age, open ethnicity

8) Homeless street person/drug addict is hanging out in an alley downtown as our protagonists enter a club, male, open age

9) Street Prostitute walking through and standing in an alley downtown as our protagonists enter a club, female, 19-35.

10) Club Bouncer minding the door in an alley as our protagonists enter a club, male, 25-40.

11) S&M swingers club types, 30's to 60's-General background-playing S&M swingers club types, may wear character appropriate clothing (if you have, even better). open age, open gender, open ethnicity. Tell your friends.

12) General underground dance club types, open age, open gender, open ethnicity

**SUBMISSIONS & AUDITION DETAILS**

Please send your resume, photos (full body + headshots) and demo reel (if available) by email to lesimmigrantsparty@gmail.com starting now until July 20th. 

Auditions in Gastown the weekend of July 24th, 25th.

**SHOOT DETAILS**

Type of project: Dramatic short film

Production Company: Ashtrey Productions

Director: Titus Heckel 
Producer, casting: Ronald Lee

Location: Vancouver, BC

Shoot Dates: August 21st-23rd, 2026, rehearsals prior

Shoot Length: 1 to 3 Days

***Compensation: Paid****/*TBD/Indie Micro-Budget, IMDb Credit, meals provided

**HOW TO SUBMIT**

Please email your headshot, resume and demo reel (if available) to lesimmigrantsparty@gmail.com

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING CALL: COMPROMISE** (VFS Short Film)

We are casting for actors to join our upcoming Vancouver Film School short film, *Compromise*!
* **Logline:** Jacob is about to get married and live a life that everyone envies, but he starts to doubt if this perfect life is what he truly wants.
* **Project Type:** Student Short Film (Non-Union)
* **Shooting Dates:** August 8th & 9th, 2026
* **Shooting Location:** Greater Vancouver Area
* **Rate:** Unpaid (Catering and craft service provided)

📌 **Casting Roles:**
* **JACOB** (Male / 26–32 / Latin)
* **JOSEPHINE** (Female / 40–55 / Latin)
* **FOSCO** (Male / 50–60 / Caucasian)
* **YAYO** (Male / 28–34 / Latin)
* **ROWAN** (Female / 27–31 / Caucasian)
* **GUESTS** (Wedding guests / Non-speaking role)

📬 **How to Submit:** Please send your **Resume, Headshot, and Demo Reel (if possible)** to `vfscompromise@gmail.com` by **July 18th, 2026**.
* Please indicate which role you’d like to be considered for in your email.
* Shortlisted applicants will be contacted for a self-tape audition (Self-tape due by July 19th, 2026).

#vfs #vancouverfilmschool #castingcall #shortfilm #studentfilm #compromise

items.text:
Hey everyone! 👋
Bit of an unusual post…

I own two unique content creation studios in South London, and I’m looking to build a small community of like-minded creatives who fancy helping each other create amazing content.

The idea is simple: every few weeks we’ll get together, shoot content, bounce ideas around, be each other’s camera operator or photographer, and then maybe grab some food or a drink afterwards. The aim is to make some great content, meet genuinely lovely people and build a supportive creator community.

It’s completely free—there’s no catch. I just think creating content is much more fun (and far easier!) when you’ve got other creative people around you.

Whether you’re into TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, UGC, photography, videography or anything else creative, it’d be great to hear from you.

If you’d like to join, please DM me with:

✨ Your phone number (I’ll put everyone into a WhatsApp group)

✨ Links to your social media

✨ A little bit about yourself—who you are, what kind of content you create (or would like to create), and anything else you’d like everyone to know.

My hope is to build a genuinely supportive community where we can all collaborate, inspire each other, make some incredible content and hopefully make some great friends along the way. 😊

items.title: Could you be our next Dot/ George/ Ringo?

items.text:
⭐️NOW CASTING⭐️

The University of Michigan Entertainment Coalition -LA is proud to present a staged reading of a new feature by alum Daniel Pipski.  

Saturday, July 25th at United Talent Agency from 11a-2p.

To be a part of the magic: submit your headshot, bio and the role to : cortney.s.wright@gmail.com no later than 6p PST Wed 7/15. 

Callbacks will be no later than Thursday, July 16th. 

Virtual rehearsal on Sunday, July 19th- time TBD but will be after 4p PST. 

If cast, please plan to arrive at UTA no later than 10:15a on Saturday, July 25th. 

THERE'S ALWAYS TOMORROW — CHARACTER BREAKDOWN

RONNIE (VERONICA SHARPE)
Female, Early 20s
Brilliant, chaotic, sarcastic, and emotionally guarded. A former startup prodigy convinced Y2K will bring about the end of civilization. Lives out of her car, rejects authority, and uses humor as armor. Beneath her confidence is profound grief and loneliness.

GLENN GARRITY
Male, 30s
A hardworking tech lead who has spent years doing everything "right." Loyal, earnest, socially awkward, and desperate for approval. After losing his job and relationship in the same day, he embarks on a wild end-of-the-world adventure that forces him to let go of control.

SUPPORTING

LEILA
Female, Late 20s
Glenn's longtime girlfriend. Free-spirited, sincere, and completely unaware of how absurd her worldview sounds to others. Believes she and Glenn have been in an open relationship for years.

STEVE
Male, 40s
Glenn's charismatic boss. A polished corporate climber who makes everyone feel special while quietly looking out for himself.

HARRIS
Male, 30s
Ronnie's former business partner and ex-boyfriend. Smart, successful, and polished. Represents a painful chapter in Ronnie's past.

KATY
Female, 30s

items.summary:
⭐️NOW CASTING⭐️

The University of Michigan Entertainment Coalition -LA is proud to present a staged reading of a new feature by alum Daniel Pipski.  

Saturday, July 25th at United Talent Agency from 11a-2p.

To be a part of the magic: submit your headshot, bio and the role to : cortney.s.wright@gmail.com no later than 6p PST Wed 7/15. 

Callbacks will be no later than Thursday, July 16th. 

Virtual rehearsal on Sunday, July 19th- time TBD but will be after 4p PST. 

If cast, please plan to arrive at UTA no later than 10:15a on Saturday, July 25th. 

THERE'S ALWAYS TOMORROW — CHARACTER BREAKDOWN

RONNIE (VERONICA SHARPE)
Female, Early 20s
Brilliant, chaotic, sarcastic, and emotionally guarded. A former startup prodigy convinced Y2K will bring about the end of civilization. Lives out of her car, rejects authority, and uses humor as armor. Beneath her confidence is profound grief and loneliness.

GLENN GARRITY
Male, 30s
A hardworking tech lead who has spent years doing everything "right." Loyal, earnest, socially awkward, and desperate for approval. After losing his job and relationship in the same day, he embarks on a wild end-of-the-world adventure that forces him to let go of control.

SUPPORTING

LEILA
Female, Late 20s
Glenn's longtime girlfriend. Free-spirited, sincere, and completely unaware of how absurd her worldview sounds to others. Believes she and Glenn have been in an open relationship for years.

STEVE
Male, 40s
Glenn's charismatic boss. A polished corporate climber who makes everyone feel special while quietly looking out for himself.

HARRIS
Male, 30s
Ronnie's former business partner and ex-boyfriend. Smart, successful, and polished. Represents a painful chapter in Ronnie's past.

KATY
Female, 30s
Ronnie's former best friend and business partner. Successful, composed, and carrying unresolved history with Ronnie.

ED

items.text:
CASTING CALL — LOS ANGELES LOCAL HIRE

We are currently casting the lead roles of **Cris** and **Rosa** for *Pregnant by a Demon*, a 30-minute scripted mockumentary comedy pilot shooting in Los Angeles.

**CRIS — LEAD**
**Hispanic** woman, 18–21. Must be 18+ and able to believably portray 16. Cris is sharp, beautiful, restless, and dryly funny. She dreams of becoming more independent and escaping the chaos of her family, but beneath the sarcasm, eye rolls, and teenage defiance, she feels everything deeply. She is caught between two worlds, two languages, and two versions of herself. The role includes one brief kiss with the character of Mike.
**Works 4 days | Rate: $1,500 total**

**ROSA — LEAD**
**Hispanic** woman, 45–65. Must be able to portray an older family matriarch through styling. Rosa is the family’s sweet-faced, sharp-tongued matriarch—warm and loving one moment, terrifying with a candle and a curse the next. She believes she is spiritually gifted, deeply misunderstood, and absolutely right about everything. Dramatic, nosy, loving, superstitious, and impossible to ignore, Rosa uses guilt, prayer, black magic, and perfectly timed insults to keep her family in line.
**Works approximately 3.5 days | Rate: $1,000 flat**

**Shoot dates:** July 20–25, 2026
**Location:** Los Angeles, CA vicinity
**Local hire only**

**Non-Union**
**Rates are all-inclusive and firm**
**Submission deadline:** July 13, 2026

Please email your **headshot, résumé, and reel** to **sheela@reigncasting.com** with the role name in the subject line.

Please **only** submit if you fit the role requirements.

Please only submit for Cris if you truly look like you can pass for high school. Submissions that do not match the requested criteria will be deleted.

items.text:
Want to add 'Improv' to your took kit? Blanche's Summer Improv Intensives start 16th July and there are courses for all levels of experience!! Details on Blanche's website: [www.blancheimprov.com/summerintensives](https://www.blancheimprov.com/summerintensives) Hope to see you there!! 

[https://www.facebook.com/share/v/1CpAPtxqhi/](https://www.facebook.com/share/v/1CpAPtxqhi/)

items.text:
# WROCŁAW I OKOLICE
# 

Zaczynamy produkcję nowego sezonu **Trudnych Spaw** w Polot Media co oznacza, że szukamy nowych aktorów! Proszę o uważne przeczytanie charakterystyki i wieku postaci - zgłoszenia kompletnie niezgodne z rolą nie będą rozpatrywane.

Zgłoszenia dla osób z **WROCŁAWIA LUB WOJEWÓDZTWA DOLNOŚLĄSKIEGO**:

**Artur Lewandowski (wiek kandydata: 31-36 l.**) **– podwładny bohaterki **

3 sceny: 21.07.2026

Atrakcyjny mężczyzna z kreatywną fryzurą. Do pracy nosi białą koszulę. Barman w restauracji. Żonaty. Rozcieńcza alkohol w pracy, przez co pozostaje w ciągłym

konflikcie z główną bohaterką.

**Wiktoria Porowska (wiek kandydatki: 23-27 l.) – oszustka **

5 scen: 21-22.07.2026

Niska, szczupła szatynka. Ubiera się skromnie i nie rzuca się w oczy. Brak cech szczególnych. Kłamliwa, chłodna, bezwzględna. Bez skrupułów oszukuje, by wyłudzić i przywłaszczyć pieniądze.

**Janusz Michalski (wiek kandydata 29-34 l.) - informatyk w firmie transportowej, kolega głównej bohaterki**

11 scen: od 21 do 23.07.2026

Powyżej 175 cm, szczupły, energiczny. Nosi nieformalną fryzurę: kucyk lub włosy do ramion.

Zakochany w głównej bohaterce. Ironiczny, z zewnątrz może sprawiać wrażenie osoby niepoważnej. W scenariuszu występuje scena pocałunku z główną bohaterką!

**Przedstawiciel firmy Cargo (40 lat)**

2 sceny 23.07 od 17:30

Wygląd dowolny.

**Pan Zbigniew Wolański (52 lata) – były kierownik magazynu**

1 scena 23.07 od 15:30

Wygląd dowolny.

Płatność gotówką od razu po planie, ceny ustalane w zależności od roli. Osoby zainteresowane proszę o wysłanie wiadomości o tytule "Trudne Sprawy + IMIĘ postaci" wraz z:
* **aktualnymi** zdjęciami twarzy i sylwetki, 
* wiekiem, 
* wzrostem i wagą, 
* numerem telefonu, 
* materiałami video z odcinków, w których występowałeś/aś (jeżeli grałeś/aś w przeszłości)

na maila julia.lisowiec@polotmedia.pl.

Proszę o kontakt WYŁĄCZNIE osoby dyspozycyjne w podanych terminach, w podanym przedziale wiekowym oraz pochodzącym z odpowiedniej lokalizacji.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '南 TRUDNE SPRAWY SPR'

items.text:
PILNE !!! WARSZAWA !!! GLINIARZE !!! JUTRO I POJUTRZE!
Poszukujemy EPIZODYSTY Z DOŚWIADCZENIEM!! 

Cezar (25-45) - wierny żołnierz Kamyka. Dobrze zbudowany, typ Gangusa. 

Daty: 13 i 14.07

Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

Chętny Panów zapraszam do wysyłania PILNYCH zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga

2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu

3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)

4. Aktualne zdjęcie

5. Krótki opis doświadczenia

6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich

7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

8. Informację kiedy ostatnio grali Państwo w serialu „Gliniarze” 

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
🎬 FREE AUDITION LOG FOR ACTORS
I created a simple audition log that I thought some of you might find useful.

When I first moved to LA, I had 80 auditions in my first three months. Keeping a log made it much easier to stay organised, track my progress, and remember which casting directors I’d read for.

It’s an easy way to keep track of:
• The project
• The type of role
• The audition date
• The casting director
• Whether you got a callback or booked the role
• Notes and feedback
• How many auditions you’re actually getting

I find it’s much easier to spot patterns and see your progress when everything is in one place.

And it’s FREE.

If you’d like a copy:

1. Comment AUDITION below.
2. Send me a DM.

I’ll send it over. 😊

items.previewTitle:
Description:

Tony Robbins is a motivational speaker and relationship strategist known for helping people understand the hidden emotional patterns that shape relationships. Through emotionally powerful live interventions, he often reveals how unresolved pain, emotional withdrawal, and poor communication can slowly damage even the strongest connections.

One of Tony Robbins’ strongest teachings is that people often misjudge emotional pain based on what they can see. Just because someone appears calm, quiet, or unaffected does not mean they are not hurting. Many people cope with emotional pain by withdrawing, suppressing their feelings, or avoiding difficult conversations altogether.

In this clip, Tony challenges the belief that a partner who doesn't openly express pain must not care. He explains that some people protect themselves emotionally by staying silent, especially when they don't feel safe, understood, or know how to communicate what they're feeling.

The conversation becomes a powerful reminder that emotional silence is not the same as emotional indifference. Sometimes the deepest pain is carried by the people who say the least, making empathy, communication, and understanding essential for a healthy relationship.

#usa #relationships #relationshipadvice #tonyrobbins

items.text:
Casting call: Short Commercial Spot - Lifestyle Scenes

Looking for multiple talent for a shoot coming up on Tuesday, July 21st for a local blood tech company. 

Location: Multiple Locations within 45 mins of Denver.  

Looking for: 
* Older couple (70+) 
* Mom with newborn - less than 6 months if possible 
* Triathlete/swimmer for open water swim (*do need to actually swim, just wearing a wetsuit and standing at the water’s edge)
* Doctor: 40-50 y/o, any gender
* Patient: 30-50 y/o, any gender
* 30-40 y/o Woman 

Timing: Still TBD, but each scene is 2 hours max on site 

Rate: $800 per role  

Digital/global/perp

If you are interested, please email me (rileyjhanlon@gmail.com) with info and pics - put Blood Anthem - Your Name in the subject. 

If you only have certain hours available during the day, please let me know. 

Thank you!

topComments.text: Product? That’s a really low rate for global perpetuity
Sending you a DM!

items.text:
Hey all you cool cats & kittens!!! Come have some fun in the sun!!! 

CFVA Summer Bash!!!!! Woohooo!!!

Join us for the CFVA Summer Bash, Colorado's can't-miss summer networking event for the production and media arts community! Whether you're behind the camera, in front of it, or making the magic happen behind the scenes, this is your chance to connect with fellow creatives in a fun, relaxed setting. Film, television, commercials, industrials, theatre, comedy, music, dance - all are invited!! 

• Sunday, August 2, 2026, 4:00 PM

• The Buntport Theater, Denver, Colorado 

• [https://bit.ly/4gyGys7](https://bit.ly/4gyGys7?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExaTlPemlkOXN3WkxKVHd4cHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6OaTol4XZ4rCwvvURQbhMX_d9BLstM6AH34hykXpEpYnyGg71WvbCy7R_jGQ_aem_AvAJiHw9laj5e1AQsFRXtA) 

Why Attend?
* IT'S SO FUN 
* Expand Your Network
* Meet filmmakers, producers, directors, editors, writers, actors, crew members, content creators, and industry professionals from across Colorado.
* Discover New Collaborations
* Whether you're looking for your next project, your next client, or your next creative partner, Summer Bash is the perfect place to start the conversation.
* Strengthen the Colorado Artist Community - across the mediums!! Film, television, commercials, industrials, theatre, comedy, music, dance - all are invited!!
* Build meaningful relationships, share ideas, and help grow a stronger, more connected community throughout the state.
* Celebrate the Industry
* Take a break from production schedules and enjoy an afternoon with the people who make Colorado's media industry thrive.

Event Highlights

• Free Admission – Everyone is welcome, but registration is encouraged.

• Food Trucks On Site – Grab dinner or a snack from a selection of local food trucks offering a variety of delicious options for purchase.

• Indoor & Outdoor Venue – Stay cool and comfortable at the unique Buntport Theater. 

• Networking & Community – Make new connections, reconnect with familiar faces, and celebrate Colorado's vibrant production/performing arts industry.

Whether you're a longtime CFVA member, new to the industry, or simply curious about Colorado's creative community, the CFVA Summer Bash is a welcoming opportunity to meet new people, exchange ideas, and build relationships that can lead to future collaborations.

Register today and join us on August 2 for an afternoon of community, conversation, and connection. We can't wait to see you at the Summer Bash!

items.text:
Hello all, 

First off, thank you for your overwhelming support and application for “Miss. Lonelyhearts Memory Light” - I made a post on here for our feature a few weeks ago and received way more engagement than I expected. Because of this community, we have been able to track down the perfect cast for our film and my heart is full. Now I only have one major role left to cast -

Delia - Female, Age 35 - 50 - Kids foster Mom. Appears primarily at the beginning and end of the film. In the finale, she is dressed completely in white, representing the "safe place" Kid eventually chooses over her father. Currently scheduled for August 5th and 7th.

If interested, please send an email to rowanharper386@gmail.com and be sure to attach a headshot and a reel if you have it. Note, we are currently working with deferred pay and I’d be happy to discuss that with you.

Additionally, we are looking for 1-3 child extras (Ages 8-12) for our first shoot day, this Wednesday - July 15th. If you have a child who would be interested, or know someone who does, please send me an email and I’d be happy to answer any questions.

Hope to chat soon,
Rowan

topComments.text: Is 15 too old for a child extra?
Email sent

items.text:
POSZUKIWANI AKTORZY NON PROFIT

14.07-18.07 WARSZAWA, SKIERNIEWICE

Krótki metraż z humorem opowiada historię stereotypu ojca postawionego w realiach systemu kaucyjnego. Film przedstawia powstałe przez zachowanie ojca problemy rodzinne oraz wynikającą z tego relację, zdanego na siebie rodzeństwa.

Do etiudy do portfolio do Łódzkiej Szkoły Filmowej poszukiwanych jest 

czterech MĘŻCZYZN W WIEKU 45-65 LAT, do roli ojca, dwóch jego kolegów i sąsiada

dwie KOBIETY W WIEKU 45-65 LAT, do roli sąsiadki ojca oraz żony jednego z jego znajomych

DZIEWCZYNA W WIEKU 19-24 LAT, do roli siostry

dwóch CHŁOPAKÓW W WIEKU 16-20 LAT do roli brata i jego znajomego

MAŁY CHŁOPIEC W WIEKU 8-12 LAT do roli dziecka spacerującego na chodniku

Proszę o kontakt w wiadomości prywatnej, na telefon: 607075035, lub na maila slawinskiantoni23@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

items.text:
🎵 WARSZAWA | 30.06 | próby NOWEGO PROGRAMU MUZYCZNEGO 🎵

Szukamy mężczyzn do udziału w próbach kamerowych nowego programu muzycznego!

🎤 Wciel się w uczestnika jednej z drużyn i poczuj dreszczyk emocji, biorąc udział w muzycznym teleturnieju. Twoim zadaniem będzie odgadywanie utworów i piosenek.

💰 Wynagrodzenie: 120 zł (płatne po realizacji).

📧 Zgłoszenia: ludzie@unagimedia.pl

📌 W tytule wiadomości wpisz: H30

W treści wiadomości podaj:

imię i nazwisko,

wiek,

numer telefonu,

zdjęcie portretowe.

Zapraszamy do zgłoszeń! 🎶

sharedPost.text:
🔥 HEROFLAME is binnenkort  KLAAR VOOR HET VUUR! 🔥
Na een prachtige internationale ervaring staat HeroFlame vanaf 25 juli opnieuw paraat voor optredens in. Heel België .
✨ Boek nu jouw vuurshow! Wij verzorgen spectaculaire en veilige vuuracts voor: 🔥 Festivals 🔥 Bedrijfsfeesten 🔥 Gemeentefeesten 🔥 Verjaardagen 🔥 Huwelijken 🔥 Avondevenementen 🔥 Themafeesten ... en nog veel meer!
💥 WIJ ZOEKEN OOK NIEUWE VUURARTIESTEN! 💥
Ben jij gepassioneerd door vuurkunst of heb je ervaring met: 🔥 Vuurspuwen 🔥 Fire Poi 🔥 Vuurstaf 🔥 Andere vuurdisciplines
Dan zijn wij op zoek naar jou! Zowel ervaren artiesten als gemotiveerde talenten zijn welkom om ons team te versterken.
📅 Beschikbaar voor boekingen vanaf 25 juli. Wacht niet te lang, want de agenda loopt opnieuw vol!
📩 Stuur gerust een privébericht via onze Facebook- of Instagrampagina _heroflame_  voor informatie, boekingen of om deel uit te maken van ons team.
🔥 HeroFlame – Fire With Passion 🔥
"Feel the energy. Live the moment. Be the fire."
#HeroFlame #FireShow #Vuurshow #Vuurartiest #FirePerformer #Entertainment #Evenementen #Festival #België #Frankrijk #WestVlaanderen #BoekNu #JoinOurTeam

 #FireWithPassion

items.text:
Grüßt euch,                                                                   
ein 14-jähriges Kind mit viel Motivation und wenig Erfahrung im Schauspielbereich, sucht Schauspieljobs, um Erfahrungen zu sammeln, damit sie einmal ihren großen Traum, ein beliebter Schauspieler zu sein erfüllen kann. 
Sie sucht Jobs ausschließlich in Bayern, falls jemand helfen kann oder eine Firma oder einen Filmproduzer kennt, bitte bei uns melden. 
Sprachen: Englisch, Deutsch und Ungarisch.
Wir würden uns sehr freuen! 
Vielen Dank für das Zuhören.                                           
  
Liebe Grüße❤️

items.text:
**CASTING CALL | Social-Media-Clip | Stuttgart | 19.07.2026**

Für die Produktion eines **Social-Media-Clips für eine aufstrebende Streetwear-Marke** suchen wir noch drei Darstellerfür einen Drehtag in **Stuttgart**.

**Gesucht werden**

**Arzt**
* männlich
* ca. 50–70 Jahre

**Empfangsmitarbeiterin**
* weiblich
* ca. 30–50 Jahre

**Patient / Patientin im Wartezimmer**
* ca. 50–80 Jahre
* gerne mit markantem oder besonderem Look
* ein eigener Hund ist ein Plus, aber kein Muss

**Dreh:** 19.07.2026
**Ort:** Stuttgart
**Drehdauer:** je nach Rolle ca. 1–3 Stunden
**Vergütung:** Gage, individuell je nach Rolle

Schauspielerische Erfahrung ist von Vorteil, aber keine Voraussetzung. Uns sind vor allem authentische Persönlichkeiten mit einer natürlichen Ausstrahlung wichtig.

Bei Interesse schickt uns bitte eine E-Mail an **[sven@versusarchive.com](mailto:sven@versusarchive.com)** mit:
* aktuellem Foto
* Alter
* Wohnort
* ggf. kurzer Vita oder schauspielerischer Erfahrung

Falls ihr euch in den genannten Rollen nicht wiederfindet, aber trotzdem Lust habt, Teil des Projekts zu sein, schreibt uns gerne trotzdem. Wir sind auf der Suche nach interessanten Gesichtern und authentischen Persönlichkeiten für eine Szene im Wartezimmer.

Wir freuen uns auf eure Bewerbungen!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people and eyeglasses

items.text:
Hello everyone!

My name is Ava Frommell, and I'm the producer of **BROADCASTING 101**, a proof-of-concept television pilot filming in Bellmore, NY next week. Due to a last-minute casting change, we're urgently seeking an actor to play **RANDY FRIEDMAN**, one of our ensemble lead roles.

**Logline:**

In this mockumentary-style workplace comedy, a naively optimistic teen filmmaker leads a chaotic high school broadcasting program through constant production disasters, determined to prove that a group of misfit students can create something meaningful.

**ROLE: RANDY FRIEDMAN**
40s (Late 30s-Late 40s), Male, White, A Social Studies teacher and GCTV’s faculty advisor, though he functions more as a friend to the crew than a traditional authority figure. He is a gay, sports-obsessed Long Island staple with enough life experience and connections to fix almost any problem. He cares deeply about the program’s image—and his own—but his heart is always with the students. ENSEMBLE LEAD

**Project Details:**

Union: Non-Union
Rate: Copy/Credit/Meals Provided
Shoot Location: Bellmore, New York (Greater NYC area)
Shoot Window: July 14th-18th

If interested, please send an email to **pbtscasting@gmail.com** with your headshot or recent photo and a 60 second slate including your full name, height, confirmation of non-union status, confirmation of availability for full date range, confirmation that you’re able to work as a Long Island local, and talk about something you’re passionate about.

Please feel free to share this post with anyone who may be a good fit. We'd love to hear from performers of all experience levels, and we're hoping to cast this role as soon as possible.

items.title: Hello everyone!

items.text:
CASTING CALL — LOS ANGELES LOCAL HIRE

We are currently casting the lead roles of **Cris** and **Rosa** for *Pregnant by a Demon*, a 30-minute scripted mockumentary comedy pilot shooting in Los Angeles.

**CRIS — LEAD**
**Hispanic** woman, 18–21. Must be 18+ and able to believably portray 16. Cris is sharp, beautiful, restless, and dryly funny. She dreams of becoming more independent and escaping the chaos of her family, but beneath the sarcasm, eye rolls, and teenage defiance, she feels everything deeply. She is caught between two worlds, two languages, and two versions of herself. The role includes one brief kiss with the character of Mike.
**Works 4 days | Rate: $1,500 total**

**ROSA — LEAD**
**Hispanic** woman, 45–65. Must be able to portray an older family matriarch through styling. Rosa is the family’s sweet-faced, sharp-tongued matriarch—warm and loving one moment, terrifying with a candle and a curse the next. She believes she is spiritually gifted, deeply misunderstood, and absolutely right about everything. Dramatic, nosy, loving, superstitious, and impossible to ignore, Rosa uses guilt, prayer, black magic, and perfectly timed insults to keep her family in line.
**Works approximately 3.5 days | Rate: $1,000 flat**

**Shoot dates:** July 20–25, 2026
**Location:** Los Angeles, CA vicinity
**Local hire only**
**Rates are all-inclusive and firm**

**This project is non-union**
**Submission deadline:** July 13, 2026

Please email your **headshot, résumé, and reel** to **sheela@reigncasting.com** with the role name in the subject line.

Please **only** submit if you fit the role requirements.

Please only submit for Cris if you truly look like you can pass for high school. Submissions that do not match the requested criteria will be deleted.

**** PAID CASTING NOTICE ****

Towers Film LV Productions is seeking a talented actress for its upcoming indie feature film.

Title: Towers

Tagline: Love is the signal that crosses every dimension

Synopsis: After their mother mysteriously disappears, two teenage sisters embark on an unforgettable journey that leads them to an ancient alien secret hidden beneath the Nevada desert.

Shoot Dates: August 1-2, 2026

Location: Las Vegas, NV

Shoot Length: 1.5 days

Rate: $200 flat

Union Status: Non-Union

ROLE:

PETRA 16yr (Supporting)

Female, 18-24 max age. Think Dustin from Stranger Things - super smart, funny, and witty. Comedic chops a must. Ethnicity: Asian, Pacific Islander or mixed heritage. 

Talent must be willing to work as a Las Vegas local hire. No travel or housing will be provided.

TO SUBMIT

Please send the following to: towerslvfilm@gmail.com

* Headshot

* Resume

* Acting reel or performance clips (required)

Selected applicants will be invited to submit a video audition.

Vi søger 2 ensemblemedlemmer til FORVOKSET (ULØNNET)
På grund af et afbud søger vi 2 personer, der har lyst til at blive en del af forestillingen FORVOKSET.

📅 Periode: Juli – 18. august (ikke alle dage – skriv for prøveplan).

📍 Prøver: Hillerød og Gilleleje.

🎭 Spillesteder: Aveny-T, Remisen og Elværket.

Vi søger dig, der: 

• Har mulighed for at deltage i prøve- og spilleperioden.

• Har lyst til at indgå i et tæt og ambitiøst ensemble. 

• Er engageret, nysgerrig og klar på en intensiv og kreativ proces.

Erfaring er ikke nødvendig – alle er velkomne!

Om forestillingen:

Forvokset handler om den fortid og de traumer, der fortsat vokser i os som voksne. Forestillingen er en fortolkning og videreudvikling af udvalgte digte fra digtsamlingen Skyggesider af Janus Hald.

(Læs mere på facebooksiden  Oh no shiit eller instagram @oh.no.shit.insta )

Kan du træde til med kort varsel – eller kender du én, der kunne være interesseret? Så skriv til os hurtigst muligt.

Vi bliver meget glade, hvis du vil dele opslaget i dit netværk😊

Skriv til os på mail: oh.no.shit.kontakt@gmail.com

STATISTER SØGES TIL DANSK SUPER8 SPILLEFILM - BYLDERUP-BOV (ULØNNET)
Vi søger statister til at agere landbrugsmedarbejdere til en dansk spillefilm som bliver optaget nær Bylderup-Bov. 

Optagelserne finder sted;

Søndag d. 12.. Juli kl 19:00 - 23:30

Mandag d. 13. Juli kl 11-21

Vi søger:

5-8 statister 

Alder: 40+

Køn: underordnet

Der vil være forplejning under optagelserne. 

Erfaring er ikke nødvendig, så længe man har gåpåmod og en sund interesse i at gøre vores film så god som muligt.

Er du interesseret, eller kender du én, som kunne være? Så send en mail til mig med:

- Navn

- Alder

- Telefonnummer

- Et vellignende billede af dig selv

Til mail: lv.studie@gmail.com

Jeg glæder mig at høre fra jer!

Mvh Lauge Visgaard - Produktionsassistent

We're back! Submissions are open for World Monologue Games 2026!

World Monologue Games is a global acting competition and virtual showcase, allowing professional and budding actors from anywhere in the world to participate. 

Video submissions. Free entry. Cash prizes. Be seen by industry professionals and leaders.

Sign up now to participate:

🎭 PERFORMING OPPORTUNITY – CASTING FOR 2026 🎭
✨ MPP Character Entertainment is now casting performers for 2026! ✨

We have an exciting year ahead filled with magical parties, immersive events and fairytale experiences! We are looking for talented performers to join our growing team!

📍 Location: Manchester & North West, UK

⸻

🌟 About the Role:

• Most events are based in Manchester and across the North West, so local performers are strongly preferred

• 🚗 A full driving licence and access to a car is required (petrol costs covered)

• 👑 Casting for a range of characters, you may be suited to multiple roles

• 🎭 A background in musical theatre, acting or performance is ideal

• 💖 We’re looking for performers who are bubbly, kind, reliable and confident working with children

We offer flexible opportunities including temporary work, short-term contracts, weekly bookings, and cover shifts, perfect whether you want regular work or occasional gigs ✨

⸻

📩 How to Apply:

Please send your CV and a recent headshot to:

📧Manager@MPPCharacterEntertainment.com

Or drop us a private message to register your interest 💌

🌐 Website: www.manchesterprincessparties.co.uk

We can’t wait to welcome new performers and create even more magical moments in 2026! ✨

MPP Character Entertainment

items.text:
CASTING NOTICE - LEAD ACTRESS – PAID

TENTH MAN FILMS is seeking to film an Independent Feature Film – Funding Teaser Trailer.

"THE DEAD OUTSIDE ROOM 17"

An ambitious independent feature film is seeking an exceptional lead actress for a professionally produced teaser trailer to support feature film financing.

"THE DEAD OUTSIDE ROOM 17" is a contained horror thriller with political suspense, blending the claustrophobic tension of "Buried" with the global stakes of "Contagion" and the relentless urgency of "24".

When a catastrophic zombie outbreak traps an international diplomat inside Room 17 of a failing hotel, she must stop the world descending into nuclear war using nothing but her intelligence, determination and a rapidly dying mobile phone—all without ever leaving the room.

The Role
This is a performance-led role for an actress capable of carrying the screen almost entirely through visual storytelling.
The teaser contains no dialogue, requiring subtle, truthful and emotionally engaging performance through expression, physicality and screen presence alone. The character is intelligent, composed and resourceful, but as events unfold she is pushed to her emotional and physical limits.

This is an exciting opportunity to become the face of a feature film currently entering the finance stage, with the intention of attaching cast and moving into full production following successful funding.

Casting Brief:
Female
Playing age: 35–55
Professional actress or experienced model with excellent on-camera presence.
Able to convey complex emotion without dialogue.
Strong dramatic ability and confident carrying scenes alone.
Previous film or television experience welcomed but not essential.

Shoot Details
Location: North West England
Shoot: One weekday afternoon/evening during July or August
Duration: Approximately 4–6 hours
Fee: £120

To Apply
Please submit:

Headshot.
Spotlight or Backstage profile.
Showreel (if available).
Current location (Cheshire based talent preferred, as there is no travel budget).
Weekday availability during July and August 2026 (TBC upon availability of cast actress/model).

Shortlisted applicants may be invited to attend an informal Zoom meeting before casting.

To contact, email MJB at tenthmanfilms@outlook.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Stayontheline.Holdthedoo. H Stay on the line. Hold the door. DEAD TSIDE ROOM'

items.text:
Evalution Media and SwanWing Productions are teaming up to bring you a triple-bill of short plays - including the adaptation of Eva Marie Wilshere 's multi-award winning short film, The Year Dot 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

Each play is a one-hander (with the exception of the carer at the end of The Year Dot, the longest of the three plays)

We're looking to cast the perfect actress for both Dot and Brenda, paying equity rates of at least £133 for each of the two performances in Nov/early Dec.

**[Saskia Wesnigk-Wood](https://www.linkedin.com/in/saskia-wesnigk-wood-b75a48222/)** of SwanWing Productions will also be auditioning for a male identifying actor for one of her two short plays.
🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟
All auditions are on Sunday 19th July 2-4pm - please contact us to see the script excerpts in advance **[info@evalutionmedia.com](mailto:info@evalutionmedia.com)**

 1 female identifying, 1 male identifying - please email info@evalutionmedia.com for the audition script excerpts.

sharedPost.text:
💎Dance Diamonds💎  26.09. - 27.09.2026 international dance competition Germany !!!
🔥Die Registration / Anmeldung ist ab sofort bis zum 10.09.26 möglich:
https://www.art-element.de/registration-competition
🌟Der Tanzwettbewerb richtet sich an Amateur-Tänzerinnen und -Tänzer ab der Alterskategorie 10 Jahre bis zur offenen Altersklasse.
🌟Die Wettbewerbsteilnahme ist in den Kategorien Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group,Group und Grand Group möglich.
🌟Der Wettbewerb umfasst eine Vielzahl unterschiedlicher Tanzstile. Darüber hinaus ist er für die Vorbereitung in verschiedenen Stufen für Performer oder Tanzgruppen vorgesehen.
🌟Competition program / Wettbewerbsprogramm:
💢​26.09.2026
Solo - Duo/Trio - Small Group - Group - Grand Group
Fortgeschritten/ Advanced:
💎Age to 10 - 13 Years/ Alter 10 - 13 Jahre - Young Teens;
💎Age to 13 - 17 Years/ Alter 13 - 17 Jahre - Teens
💎Age to 17 - 21 Years/ Alter 17 - 21 Jahre - Young Adults
💎Age to 21 - 27 Years/ Alter 21- 27 Jahre - Adults
Offene  Alterskategorie, 27+/ open Age category 27+
💎Mixed Alterskategorie/ Mixed Age category - only Group's
All age groups and all dance styles.
💎 - Classical Ballet / Pointe
💎 - Neo Classic/ Contemporary/ Lyrical dance
💎- Nationaltanz, Folklore, Charakter-, Hof-, Historischer Tanz
💎 - Hip Hop / Streetdance / Breakdance / Krump
💎 - Jazz-, Modern Dance/ Jazz Funk
💎 - Show Dance/Musical/ Stage Dance
💎 - Open - Mix Dance Styles​​
💢 27.09.2026
​Solo - Duo/Trio - Small Group - Group - Grand Group
Beginners/ Novices
💎Age to 10 - 13 Years/ Alter 10 - 13 Jahre - Young Teens
💎Age to 13 - 17 Years/ Alter 13 - 17 Jahre - Teens
💎Age to 17 - 21 Years/ Alter 17 - 21 Jahre - Young Adults
💎Age to 21 - 27 Years/ Alter 21- 27 Jahre - Adults
💎Offene  Alterskategorie, 27+/ open Age category 27+
💎Mixed Alterskategorie/ Mixed Age category - only Group's
🌟All age groups and all dance styles.​
💎 - Classical Ballet / Pointe
💎 - Neo Classic/ Contemporary/ Lyrical dance
💎 - Nationaltanz, Folklore, Charakter-, Hof-, Historischer Tanz
💎 - Hip Hop / Streetdance / Breakdance / Krump
💎 - Jazz-, Modern Dance/ Jazz Funk
💎 - Show Dance/Musical/ Stage Dance
💎 - Open - Mix Dance Styles​​
💥Registration/ Anmeldung bis 10.09. 2026 möglich / Registration is open until September 10, 2026.
🔥Das Wettbewerb präsentiert über Livestream für alle Interessenten kostenfrei und ohne extra Anmeldung über unsere Online Plattform.
💥Award -  die Bewertung läuft nach Punkten System von hochkarätige Jury.
Die Gewinner der 1 - 2 - 3 erhalten Pokale und Medaillen.
🏆 🥈🥈🥈 🥉🥉🥉 🥇🥇🥇 🏆
💎DANCE DIAMONDS KIDS💎
"Dance Diamonds Kids" 19.12. - 20.12.2026
Die Anmeldung ist vom 01.10.26 bis zum 06.12.26 möglich.
🌟Das Wettbewerb ist speziell für junge Performerinnen und Performer im Alter von 3 bis 12 Jahren organisiert. Die Teilnahme erfolgt in den Kategorien Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group und Group.
🌟Zudem werden die Teilnehmer nach ihren Vorbereitungsstufen, sei es für Einzelperformer oder Tanzgruppen, in unterschiedliche Kategorien eingeteilt.
🌟Auf der Webseite www.art-element.de finden Sie detaillierte Informationen über unser Team, unsere Projekte- und Events - Programme sowie Archive.
Für weitere Fragen stehen wir Ihnen gerne telefonisch oder per WhatsApp: 0049-1577- 3131438 zur Verfügung.
💎DANCE DIAMONDS
Stadthalle Kleve, Lohstätte 7 · 47533 Kleve, NRW,Germany
💎DANCE DIAMONDS KIDS💎
Stadthalle Hückelhoven,Rathausplatz 1, 41836 Hückelhoven, NRW, Germany

items.text:
Darsteller:innen für Werbedreh in Berlin und Düsseldorf
Für eine hochwertige Werbeproduktion suchen wir 20 Darsteller:innen im Alter von 18 bis 45 Jahren.

WICHTIG: Ihr müsst wirklich aus Berlin oder Düsseldorf kommen!

Drehort: Berlin

Drehtermin: 05.08.

Drehort: Düsseldorf 

Drehtermin: 03.08.

Einsatzzeit: Maximal 6 Stunden pro Person.

Gage: 1.750 € inklusive Nutzungsrechte und Reisekosten.

Nutzungsrechte:

- Digital

- OOH

- VoD

- Online Paid

- All Print

- Deutschland

- Laufzeit: 1 Jahr

Rechnungsstellung ist möglich.

Worauf wir achten

Wir suchen Menschen,

- die sympathisch sind.

- die glaubwürdig wirken.

- die authentisch sprechen – es muss nicht alles perfektes Hochdeutsch sein.

- die eine Macher-Ausstrahlung haben (nicht Macker). Macher:innen sind Menschen, die den Mut haben, Dinge anzupacken.

- die Optimismus und Aufbruch vermitteln.

- die Emotionen zulassen.

- die neugierig und offen sind.

- die Lust haben, über das Thema Altersvorsorge zu sprechen – menschlich, authentisch und echt.

Wir suchen keine Expert:innen.

Fachkenntnisse sind nicht erforderlich. Wir möchten keine auswendig gelernten Sätze oder werblichen Verkaufstexte hören. Uns interessieren echte Gedanken, ehrliche Meinungen und authentische Menschen.

Bitte bewerbt euch auf Kiezkomparsen.de. Füllt ein vollständiges Profil aus und schreibt mir eine DM mit eurem Vor- und Nachnamen, wenn ihr euch beworben habt. Danach bekommt ihr dann alle weiteren Infos.

items.text:
There isn’t a handbook for raising a young performer but there is a lot to learn along the way! 🎭

Whether your child is attending their very first audition or already has professional experience, the industry can feel exciting, rewarding... and sometimes overwhelming.

That’s why we’ve put together a few reminders we believe every parent should know.

✨ Success isn’t just about booking the job.
✨ Keeping profiles and materials up to date matters.
✨ Most importantly, helping your child continue to love performing is the greatest success of all.

Behind every young performer is a parent, guardian or family member cheering them on, driving them to rehearsals, learning new industry terms and celebrating every milestone, big or small!

We hope this carousel helps you feel a little more informed and a little more supported on that journey.

💬 What’s one piece of advice you wish you’d been given when your child started performing?

📌 Save this post for whenever you need a reminder, and share it with another parent navigating the industry.

COMMENT ‘SELF TAPE GUIDE’ and we will send you our free guide 🤩

May be a graphic of text that says 'chorey SUCCESS ISN'T MEASURED → BY BOOKINGS. Confidence. Resilience. Creativity. Enjoyment. These are are just as important.'
May be a graphic of ‎text that says '‎cho Chi chorry pips ciees יחות 4 THINGS EVERY PARENT OF A YOUNG PERFORMER SHOULD KNOW cherrypipsacting.co.uk‎'‎

May be a graphic of text that says 'YOUR CHILD'S AGENT IS YOUR TEAMMATE. Keep them informed about: .Holidays •School commitments → •New skills Appearance changes Communication helps them submit your child for the right opportunities.'

May be a graphic of text that says 'LEARN HOW to SELF-TAPE. SELF- ΓΑΡΕ. Many first-round auditions now happen from home, so creating a simple self-tape setup is a valuable skill. Message us and we will send you our FREE SELF-TAPE GUIDE for for and young performers. parents'

items.text:
Your headshots are there to help casting professionals quickly see where you fit and the kinds of roles they can picture you in.

As a headshot photographer, I'm currently involved in a commercial casting process - and reviewing a large number of applications has only confirmed this.

The more your headshots are aligned with your casting, the easier it becomes for people to see you in the role. Just as importantly, subtle nuances in expression, energy and character can set one application apart from another.

And that's what I aim for in every headshot session.

Whether you're updating your existing headshots or having your very first ones, I specialise in expression-led, casting-ready images that read clearly on Spotlight and other casting platforms.

If you prefer to work in the comfort of your own home (or another suitable location), my portable studio can come to you - along with me, of course! 🙂 Alternatively, you're very welcome at my studio in Grantham, Lincolnshire.

Feel free to send me a message or find out more at:
https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk

sharedPost.text:
Dylan Has Autism and Is Chasing His Dream of Becoming a Full-Time Actor ❤️ Please Watch His Story

Dylan has autism, but that has never stopped him from pursuing his dream of becoming a full-time actor. Every audition, every role, and every opportunity brings him one step closer to achieving what he's worked so hard for.

This video shares Dylan's journey, his determination, and the passion that drives him every single day. If his story inspires you, the best way you can support him is by watching the full video, leaving a comment, and sharing it with others.

Thank you for taking a few minutes to support Dylan's dream. ❤️

#Autism #AutismAcceptance #AutismAwareness #Actor #acting

items.text:
**Agencja Aktorska Edwin Film poszukuje mężczyzn statystów z Kalisza i okolic, do serialu fabularnego, osadzonego w Polsce w latach 90. **

Miejsce zdjęć: **Kalisz**. Dni zdjęciowe w terminach: **4 - 17 sierpnia 2026**. 

Nie wymagana pełna dyspozycyjność we wszystkie dni.

 

Poszukujemy mężczyzn o różnych typach sylwetki w przedziale wiekowym 20-60 lat. Rola osadzonych w Zakładzie Karnym. Ze względu na historyczne miejsce akcji w latach 90 wymagane jest: brak widocznych współczesnych tatuaży, fryzury jedynie krótkie i klasyczne o naturalnym kolorze lub włosy ogolone, brak piercingu.

 

**Jak wysłać zgłoszenie:**

 

Prosimy o wysłanie zgłoszenia drogą mailową na [iga.edwinfilm@gmail.com](mailto:iga.edwinfilm@gmail.com) zawierającego:

 
1. Imię i nazwisko
2. Miejsce zamieszkania 
3. Wiek
4. Wymiary
5. Wyraźne zdjęcie portretowe i zdjęcie pełnej sylwetki.
6. Informację o dostępności w wymienionych datach zdjęć.

🟣 TEATR MŁODEGO WIDZA Z WOLIMIERZA POSZUKUJE AKTORÓW! 🟣
🎭 Dołącz do zespołu teatralnego, naucz się aktorstwa od profesjonalnych aktorów od razu na scenie i występuj w spektaklach dla dzieci i młodzieży w całej Polsce!

🔹 KOGO SZUKAMY?
✔️ aktorów z doświadczeniem
✔️ lub młodych, utalentowanych osób, które chcą nauczyć się zawodu aktora

🔹 OFERUJEMY:
✅ pracę od połowy września 2026 do czerwca@ 2027(z możliwością przedłużenia)
✅ granie 2 tygodnie w miesiącu (pon–pt)
✅ atrakcyjne wynagrodzenie
✅ spektakle w całej Polsce
✅ transport i noclegi w trasie
✅ profesjonalne szkolenia z teatru formy (maski, lalki)
✅ rozwój artystyczny w kreatywnym zespole

🔹 OCZEKUJEMY:
🎙️ dobrej dykcji
🎯 dyspozycyjności na próbach we Wrocławiu od sierpnia
🎭 zaangażowania i odpowiedzialności

📞 Kontakt: 600 236 767

📌 Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi kandydatami

items.text:
🌟 *BIG NEWS! Welcome Emma Jane to Majestic Elite Associates!* Emma has been with Majestic doing some amazing choreography and now back with us for something spectacular! *Starting back in September*

We're incredibly excited to announce that Emma Jane will now be taking over our Majestic Elite Associates (MEA) programme as our lead choreographer!

Bringing a wealth of professional industry experience, creativity and passion, Emma is ready to inspire, challenge and develop the next generation of elite dancers.

Alongside Emma, meet Summer-Joules & Eva, two of our amazing MEA dancers who represent the standard, dedication and talent we're looking for.

✨ Could YOU be our next Majestic Elite Associate?

Expressions of Interest are 

NOW OPEN!

Majestic Elite Associates (MEA) is our audition or invitation-only elite training programme for dancers who want to perform, compete and train at the highest level.

*12 years and over - younger with exceptions of strong dancers*

✨ What you'll receive:

🏆 Elite dance & performance training
💜 Weekly inspiration and mentoring from Emma Jane
🥇 Competition opportunities, including Dance World Cup
🎭 Theatre, TV and live performance opportunities
🌍 Industry connections across the UK & Europe with the aim for paid work
🎓 Accredited examinations with UCAS points available
Commitment
📅 1 Sunday per month
➕ Optional Saturdays | 4:00pm-7:00pm
⚠️ Limited places available.
👉 Register your interest today:

https://tally.so/r/gDp48d

Train. Perform. Inspire. Become a Majestic Elite Associate. 💜💛

If you have strong convictions, are passionate about what you believe in and have something to say, we want to hear from you!

 

How long could you survive being handcuffed to someone who sees the world differently to you? 

 

You’ll have the chance to share your opinions, influence someone else’s perspective, and win a share of £100,000. 

To apply, visit ww.handcuffedcasting.com

items.text:
**CASTING CALL: CHOOSE LOVE (Student Short Film)**

We are casting actors to join our upcoming short film, *Choose Love*.

**Logline:**
After the death of her husband, a lonely South Asian widow discovers love with another woman for the first time. When betrayal shatters her heart, she must learn to heal, embrace her true identity, and open herself to the possibility of love once again.

**Project Type:** Student Short Film (Non-Union)
**Shooting Dates:** July 29–31, 2026
**Shooting Location:** Greater Vancouver Area
**Rate:** Unpaid (Meals, catering, and screen credit provided)

📌 **Casting Roles:**

**NINA** (Female / 45–55 / South Asian)
A warm, selfless widow who has spent her life living according to societal expectations. After years of suppressing her true identity, she embarks on a journey of love and self-discovery.

**PREE** (Female / 18–25 / South Asian)
Nina's daughter. Intelligent, funny, and fiercely protective of her mother. She encourages Nina to pursue happiness and becomes her greatest source of support.

**AISHA** (Female / 30–50 / Any Ethnicity)
Elegant, charismatic, and mysterious. She enters Nina's life during a vulnerable time and awakens feelings Nina never thought she could experience.

**CELESTE** (Female / 30–50 / Any Ethnicity)
Kind, grounded, and quietly confident. Celeste represents hope, healing, and the possibility of new beginnings.

📬 **How to Submit:**
Please send your **Headshot, Resume, and Demo Reel (if available)** to **[kaurprabhleen@icloud.com](mailto:kaurprabhleen@icloud.com)**.

Please indicate the role you are submitting for in the subject line.

Shortlisted applicants will be contacted regarding self-tape auditions.

**Themes:** Identity • Second Chances • Grief • Self-Acceptance • LGBTQ+ Representation

We welcome submissions from both emerging and experienced performers.

items.summary:
**CASTING CALL: CHOOSE LOVE (Student Short Film)**

We are casting actors to join our upcoming short film, *Choose Love*.

**Logline:**
After the death of her husband, a lonely South Asian widow discovers love with another woman for the first time. When betrayal shatters her heart, she must learn to heal, embrace her true identity, and open herself to the possibility of love once again.

**Project Type:** Student Short Film (Non-Union)
**Shooting Dates:** July 29–31, 2026
**Shooting Location:** Greater Vancouver Area
**Rate:** Unpaid (Meals, catering, and screen credit provided)

📌 **Casting Roles:**

**NINA** (Female / 45–55 / South Asian)
A warm, selfless widow who has spent her life living according to societal expectations. After years of suppressing her true identity, she embarks on a journey of love and self-discovery.

**PREE** (Female / 18–25 / South Asian)
Nina's daughter. Intelligent, funny, and fiercely protective of her mother. She encourages Nina to pursue happiness and becomes her greatest source of support.

**AISHA** (Female / 30–50 / Any Ethnicity)
Elegant, charismatic, and mysterious. She enters Nina's life during a vulnerable time and awakens feelings Nina never thought she could experience.

**CELESTE** (Female / 30–50 / Any Ethnicity)
Kind, grounded, and quietly confident. Celeste represents hope, healing, and the possibility of new beginnings.

📬 **How to Submit:**
Please send your **Headshot, Resume, and Demo Reel (if available)** to **[kaurprabhleen@icloud.com](mailto:kaurprabhleen@icloud.com)**.

Please indicate the role you are submitting for in the subject line.

Shortlisted applicants will be contacted regarding self-tape auditions.

**Themes:** Identity • Second Chances • Grief • Self-Acceptance • LGBTQ+ Representation

We welcome submissions from both emerging and experienced performers.

**WARSZAWA**

**16-17-18 lipca**

**cdn.**

** **

Zapraszam na plany pierwszych dni zdjęciowych nowego serialu dla jednej z telewizji. Bardzo ogólnie – jesteśmy w temacie footballu. I daleko od fair play 

 

**16 LIPCA (czwartek)**

wyjeżdżamy ok. 30km za Warszawę, do Czernideł.

**- MIESZKAŃCY WSI** – wiek ok. 35-70 lat. W zasadzie brak górnej granicy. **Stawka 120 zł** gotówką po planie

**- STATYŚCI Z AUTEM -  **wiek jak powyżej. Zdjęcia auta poproszę w zgłoszeniu. **Stawka 200** **zł **(120 zł + 80 zł) gotówką po planie

 

**17 LIPCA (piątek)**

gramy w Warszawie Wesoła, na cmentarzu pogrzeb jednego z ultrasów

**- MŁODE DZIEWCZYNY –** w typie dziewczyn z klubu ultrasów. Ładne, fajnie jak będą wydziarane, z pazurem. **Stawka 180 zł** za dzień zdjęciowy. **Kontynuacja 20 i 22 sierpnia.**

**- PRZYJACIELE ULTRASÓW –** panowie w wieku 18-45 lat. Typ kiboli. **Stawka 180 zł** za dzień zdjęciowy. **Kontynuacja 20 i 22 sierpnia.**

**- MINISTRANCI –** wiek 16 lat (ukończone) – 20 lat. **Stawka 120 zł** gotówką

**- KOŚCIELNY / GRABARZE – **panowie 40+. **Stawka 120 zł** gotówką

**- TAJNIACY -**  panowie ok. 30-50 lat. **Stawka 120 zł** gotówką

 

**18 LIPCA (sobota)**

gramy na stacji benzynowej na Pradze. Sceny rodem z filmów akcji

**- SPRZEDAWCA –** mężczyzna ok. 30-40 lat. **Stawka 110 zł** gotówką

**- POLICJANCI I POLICJANTKA / TECHNIK POLICYJNY –** wiek ok. 20-40 lat. **Stawka 120 zł** gotówką. Rozmiar M i L panowie. Panie S i M

**- KLIENCI STACJI –** wiek i płeć zróżnicowane. **Stawka 110 zł **gotówką

**- STATYŚCI Z AUTEM -  **wiek jak powyżej. Zdjęcia auta poproszę w zgłoszeniu. **Stawka 180** **zł **(110 zł + 70 zł) gotówką po planie

** **

 

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **KS + wybrany dzień**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość

W załączniku: **aktualne** **zdjęcie twarzy (selfie najlepiej) i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

items.text:
[WROCŁAW] POSZUKIWANI AKTORZY - PRACA W TEATRZE - UDZIAŁ W SPEKTAKLACH

Poszukujemy doświadczonej aktorsko osoby do roli młodego mężczyzny (postać w wieku ok. 20-35 lat) w spektaklach dla dzieci, młodzieży i dorosłych.

WYMAGANIA:

• dobre umiejętności aktorskie i swoboda w pracy przed publicznością,

• wysoka kultura osobista i komunikatywność,

• zaangażowanie oraz odpowiedzialne podejście do powierzonych zadań,

• dyspozycyjność od poniedziałku do piątku w godzinach porannych

• mile widziane dodatkowe umiejętności, np. śpiew, taniec, gra na instrumencie, umiejętności cyrkowe, itp.

OFERUJEMY:

• regularną współpracę

• komfortowy grafik - pracujemy głównie w godzinach porannych (kończymy około 12:00-13:00) + jedna sobota w miesiącu

• rozwój - możliwość udziału w różnorodnych projektach artystycznych

• atrakcyjne wynagrodzenie

JAK APLIKOWAĆ?

Prześlij CV na adres: magicznyteatr@onet.pl

items.text:
CASTING CALL

TITLE: Waiting on the Sky

GENRE: Drama/Comedy

LOGLINE: Three friends wait for the imminent alien arrival. On a rooftop patio they learn more about each other and uncover what they are really waiting for. 

ROLES:

Keely - A young woman in her 20s/30s, the alien hunter

Janice - A young woman in her 20s/30s, the supportive friend

Gordie - A young man in his 20s/30s, the uninvested doubter

PRODUCTION COMPANY: Denver Community Media. We are Denver’s community media access program and set up productions for students to get hands-on experience.

WRITER/DIRECTOR: Austin Anderson

PRODUCTION TYPE: Student Short Film

CONCTACT: Austin.Anderson@denvergov.org

RUN TIME: ~10 minutes

COMPENSATION: Unpaid

UNION STATUS: Non-Union

AUDITION INFORMATION: Self Tape or in-person at Denver Community Media

SHOOT DATES: July 16th and 17th from 5pm - 9pm. Must be available for both dates. 

Cheers!
